dungeon: The air grows thick and damp as you step into the chamber. Cobwebs hang from the ceiling like tattered curtains.
Your torchlight reveals ancient stonework, cracked and worn by centuries of neglect. Something skitters in the shadows.
A musty corridor stretches before you, its walls lined with faded murals of forgotten battles.
The room opens up into a wide hall. Pillars of dark stone rise to a vaulted ceiling above.
Water drips steadily from somewhere overhead, pooling in cracks between the flagstones.
cave: Natural stone formations jut from floor and ceiling, creating a maze of mineral columns.
The cave walls glisten with moisture. Bioluminescent fungi cast an eerie pale glow.
Loose gravel crunches underfoot as you enter a wider cavern. The echo carries far.
Stalactites hang like stone teeth from the ceiling above. The air smells of wet earth.
crypt: Rows of stone sarcophagi line the walls, their lids carved with stern-faced effigies.
The crypt reeks of decay and old incense. Alcoves hold the remains of the long dead.
Dusty bones rest in niches along the corridor. Some of them look... recently disturbed.
Funerary urns sit on shelves carved into the rock. A cold draft moans through the passage.

combat_start: Steel rings against stone as weapons are drawn. Roll for initiative!
The creature snarls and lunges! Combat begins!
Hostile intent fills the air. The enemy moves to attack!
A guttural war cry echoes off the walls. Prepare yourself!
The shadows coalesce into a threatening form. Battle is joined!
combat_end: The last enemy falls. Silence returns to the chamber.
You stand victorious, though the battle has taken its toll.
The threat is vanquished. You catch your breath among the fallen.
Combat ends. The adrenaline slowly fades as quiet settles in.
Your foes lie defeated. The dungeon holds its breath once more.
item_discovery: Something glints in the dim light, half-buried in the debris.
Amid the rubble, you spot something worth investigating.
Your keen eyes notice an object tucked into a crevice nearby.
A faint magical aura draws your attention to a forgotten treasure.
Searching the area, your hands close around something useful.

choice_scenarios.text: The corridor forks ahead. A foul stench drifts from the left passage, while faint chanting echoes from the right.
choices: Take the left passage toward the stench
Follow the chanting to the right

choice_scenarios.text: You find an ornate chest, its lock glowing with arcane runes. A skeletal hand rests on the lid, still clutching a rusted key.
choices: Use the rusted key to open the chest
Attempt to disarm the magical ward
Leave it alone — it smells like a trap

choice_scenarios.text: A wounded goblin cowers in the corner, whimpering. It raises its hands in a gesture of surrender.
choices: Show mercy and let it go
Put it out of its misery

rest: You find a defensible alcove and take a moment to rest. The dungeon's ambient sounds feel almost peaceful.
Leaning against cool stone, you catch your breath and tend to your wounds.
A brief respite. You eat a ration and check your equipment.
level_transition: Stone stairs spiral downward into deeper darkness. The air grows colder with each step.
You descend further into the earth. The walls here are rougher, more ancient.
The passage slopes down. Whatever lies ahead, it has not seen visitors in a long while.
